metadata.description: Batch 14 of 50 — Oxford 3000 words 1301-1400; source-aligned sequence

words.definitionEn: a violent tropical storm with very strong winds
words.definitionTh: พายุเฮอริเคน
words.example: The hurricane damaged many buildings.

words.definitionEn: to move or act quickly; a need to be quick
words.definitionTh: รีบ / ความเร่งรีบ
words.example: Please hurry or we will be late.

words.definitionEn: to cause pain or injury; injured or upset
words.definitionTh: ทำให้เจ็บ / บาดเจ็บ
words.example: He hurt his hand at work.

words.definitionEn: a married man in relation to his spouse
words.definitionTh: สามี
words.example: Her husband works at the hospital.

words.definitionEn: used by a speaker to refer to himself or herself
words.definitionTh: ฉัน / ผม
words.example: I will check the report today.

words.definitionEn: water that has frozen and become solid
words.definitionTh: น้ำแข็ง
words.example: The ice melted quickly.

words.definitionEn: a sweet frozen food made from milk or cream
words.definitionTh: ไอศกรีม
words.example: They ate ice cream after dinner.

words.definitionEn: a thought, plan, or suggestion
words.definitionTh: ความคิด / แนวคิด
words.example: She proposed a useful idea.

words.definitionEn: perfectly suitable; a perfect example or standard
words.definitionTh: เหมาะที่สุด / อุดมคติ
words.example: This temperature is ideal for storage.

words.definitionEn: to recognize or name someone or something
words.definitionTh: ระบุ / จำแนก
words.example: We identified the root cause.

words.definitionEn: who a person is or the qualities that define something
words.definitionTh: ตัวตน / อัตลักษณ์
words.example: The card confirms her identity.

words.definitionEn: used to introduce a possible or conditional situation
words.definitionTh: ถ้า
words.example: Call me if you need help.

words.definitionEn: to pay no attention to someone or something
words.definitionTh: เพิกเฉย
words.example: Do not ignore the warning.

words.definitionEn: not well or healthy
words.definitionTh: ป่วย
words.example: She was too ill to work.

words.definitionEn: not allowed by law
words.definitionTh: ผิดกฎหมาย
words.example: It is illegal to copy the software.

words.definitionEn: a disease or period of being unwell
words.definitionTh: ความเจ็บป่วย
words.example: He returned after a long illness.

words.definitionEn: to explain or decorate using pictures or examples
words.definitionTh: อธิบายด้วยภาพ / ยกตัวอย่าง
words.example: The diagram illustrates the process.

words.definitionEn: a picture or example used to explain something
words.definitionTh: ภาพประกอบ / ตัวอย่าง
words.example: The manual includes a clear illustration.

words.definitionEn: a picture, photograph, or visual representation
words.definitionTh: ภาพ
words.example: The camera captured a sharp image.

words.definitionEn: existing only in the mind and not real
words.definitionTh: จินตนาการ / ไม่มีจริง
words.example: The story describes an imaginary world.

words.definitionEn: the ability to form ideas or pictures in the mind
words.definitionTh: จินตนาการ
words.example: The design shows great imagination.

words.definitionEn: to form a picture or idea in your mind
words.definitionTh: จินตนาการ
words.example: Imagine a factory with no defects.

words.definitionEn: happening or done without delay
words.definitionTh: ทันที
words.example: The problem requires immediate action.

words.definitionEn: without delay
words.definitionTh: ทันที
words.example: Stop the machine immediately.

words.definitionEn: a person who comes to live permanently in another country
words.definitionTh: ผู้อพยพ
words.example: The city is home to many immigrants.

words.definitionEn: a strong effect; to affect something strongly
words.definitionTh: ผลกระทบ / ส่งผลกระทบ
words.example: The change had a positive impact.

words.definitionEn: annoyed because you have to wait
words.definitionTh: ใจร้อน / ไม่อดทน
words.example: The customer became impatient.

words.definitionEn: to suggest something without saying it directly
words.definitionTh: สื่อเป็นนัย
words.example: The results imply that the method works.

words.definitionEn: a product brought from abroad; to bring it into a country
words.definitionTh: สินค้านำเข้า / นำเข้า
words.example: The company imports specialist equipment.

words.definitionEn: the quality of being important
words.definitionTh: ความสำคัญ
words.example: The training emphasized the importance of safety.

words.definitionEn: having great value, effect, or influence
words.definitionTh: สำคัญ
words.example: Accuracy is important in this process.

words.definitionEn: to officially force a rule, tax, or condition
words.definitionTh: กำหนด / บังคับใช้
words.example: The authority imposed new restrictions.

words.definitionEn: not able to happen or be done
words.definitionTh: เป็นไปไม่ได้
words.example: It is impossible to finish today.

words.definitionEn: to make someone admire or respect you
words.definitionTh: ทำให้ประทับใจ
words.example: The presentation impressed the managers.

words.definitionEn: feeling admiration or approval
words.definitionTh: ประทับใจ
words.example: We were impressed by the result.

words.definitionEn: an opinion or feeling formed about someone or something
words.definitionTh: ความประทับใจ / ความคิดเห็น
words.example: The factory made a good impression.

words.definitionEn: causing admiration because of quality or size
words.definitionTh: น่าประทับใจ
words.example: The team achieved impressive savings.

words.definitionEn: to become or make something better
words.definitionTh: ปรับปรุง
words.example: We improved the inspection method.

words.definitionEn: a change that makes something better
words.definitionTh: การปรับปรุง
words.example: The project delivered a major improvement.

words.definitionEn: inside a place, period, or situation
words.definitionTh: ใน
words.example: The tools are in the cabinet.

words.definitionEn: a unit of length equal to 2.54 centimetres
words.definitionTh: นิ้ว
words.example: Move the sensor one inch closer.

words.definitionEn: an event, especially an unusual or unpleasant one
words.definitionTh: เหตุการณ์
words.example: The safety incident was investigated.

words.definitionEn: to contain something as part of a group or whole
words.definitionTh: รวมถึง
words.example: The price includes delivery.

words.definitionEn: contained as part of something
words.definitionTh: รวมอยู่ด้วย
words.example: Breakfast is included in the price.

words.definitionEn: used to show that something is part of a group
words.definitionTh: รวมถึง
words.example: Five people attended, including the manager.

words.definitionEn: money received from work, business, or investments
words.definitionTh: รายได้
words.example: Her monthly income increased.

words.definitionEn: to become or make greater; a rise in amount
words.definitionTh: เพิ่ม / การเพิ่มขึ้น
words.example: Production increased by ten percent.

words.definitionEn: more and more
words.definitionTh: มากขึ้นเรื่อย ๆ
words.example: The process is increasingly automated.

words.definitionEn: extremely good, large, or difficult to believe
words.definitionTh: เหลือเชื่อ
words.example: The team made incredible progress.

words.definitionEn: to an extremely high degree
words.definitionTh: อย่างเหลือเชื่อ
words.example: The new camera is incredibly fast.

words.definitionEn: used to emphasize that something is true
words.definitionTh: จริง ๆ / แท้จริง
words.example: The result was indeed surprising.

words.definitionEn: not controlled by or depending on others
words.definitionTh: เป็นอิสระ
words.example: The test was reviewed by an independent expert.

words.definitionEn: to show or point out something
words.definitionTh: บ่งชี้
words.example: The red light indicates a fault.

words.definitionEn: not direct or not following the shortest route
words.definitionTh: โดยอ้อม
words.example: The project produced indirect benefits.

words.definitionEn: one person or thing; relating to one person or thing
words.definitionTh: บุคคล / รายบุคคล
words.example: Each individual received training.

words.definitionEn: located, used, or happening inside a building
words.definitionTh: ในร่ม
words.example: The event was held in an indoor area.

words.definitionEn: inside a building
words.definitionTh: ในอาคาร
words.example: The equipment must be stored indoors.

words.definitionEn: relating to industry or factories
words.definitionTh: ทางอุตสาหกรรม
words.example: The camera is designed for industrial use.

words.definitionEn: businesses that produce goods or services of one type
words.definitionTh: อุตสาหกรรม
words.example: She works in the food industry.

words.definitionEn: a disease caused by harmful organisms
words.definitionTh: การติดเชื้อ
words.example: Clean hands reduce the risk of infection.

words.definitionEn: the power to affect someone or something; to affect
words.definitionTh: อิทธิพล / มีอิทธิพล
words.example: Temperature influences product quality.

words.definitionEn: to tell someone about something
words.definitionTh: แจ้งให้ทราบ
words.example: Please inform the supervisor immediately.

words.definitionEn: relaxed and not official
words.definitionTh: ไม่เป็นทางการ
words.example: We had an informal discussion.

words.definitionEn: facts or details about a subject
words.definitionTh: ข้อมูล
words.example: The dashboard provides useful information.

words.definitionEn: one of the foods or substances used to make something
words.definitionTh: ส่วนผสม
words.example: Milk is the main ingredient.

words.definitionEn: happening at the beginning
words.definitionTh: เริ่มแรก
words.example: The initial test was successful.

words.definitionEn: at the beginning
words.definitionTh: ในตอนแรก
words.example: Initially, the system was difficult to use.

words.definitionEn: a new plan or the ability to act independently
words.definitionTh: โครงการริเริ่ม / ความคิดริเริ่ม
words.example: The factory launched a safety initiative.

words.definitionEn: to physically hurt a person or animal
words.definitionTh: ทำให้บาดเจ็บ
words.example: The sharp edge could injure someone.

words.definitionEn: physically hurt
words.definitionTh: ได้รับบาดเจ็บ
words.example: The injured worker received treatment.

words.definitionEn: physical harm to the body
words.definitionTh: การบาดเจ็บ
words.example: The guard helps prevent injury.

words.definitionEn: inside or closer to the centre
words.definitionTh: ด้านใน
words.example: Check the inner surface of the pipe.

words.definitionEn: not guilty of a crime or wrongdoing
words.definitionTh: บริสุทธิ์ / ไม่มีความผิด
words.example: The court found her innocent.

words.definitionEn: a small animal with six legs
words.definitionTh: แมลง
words.example: An insect landed on the window.

words.definitionEn: in or into the inner part of something
words.definitionTh: ข้างใน
words.example: The sensor is inside the cabinet.

words.definitionEn: a clear and deep understanding of something
words.definitionTh: ข้อมูลเชิงลึก
words.example: The data gave us valuable insight.

words.definitionEn: to say firmly that something must happen or is true
words.definitionTh: ยืนยัน / ยืนกราน
words.example: The manager insisted on another test.

words.definitionEn: to make someone feel motivated or creative
words.definitionTh: สร้างแรงบันดาลใจ
words.example: The success inspired the whole team.

words.definitionEn: to put equipment or software in place ready for use
words.definitionTh: ติดตั้ง
words.example: The technician installed the camera.

words.definitionEn: an example or particular case
words.definitionTh: กรณี / ตัวอย่าง
words.example: This is one instance of the problem.

words.definitionEn: in place of someone or something else
words.definitionTh: แทน
words.example: Use the new sensor instead.

words.definitionEn: an organization created for education or research
words.definitionTh: สถาบัน
words.example: The research institute published the study.

words.definitionEn: a large organization, especially one serving the public
words.definitionTh: สถาบัน / องค์กร
words.example: The university is a respected institution.

words.definitionEn: information explaining how to do something
words.definitionTh: คำแนะนำ / คำสั่ง
words.example: Follow the safety instruction.

words.definitionEn: a person who teaches a skill
words.definitionTh: ผู้สอน
words.example: The instructor demonstrated the procedure.

words.definitionEn: a tool used for measuring or a device for making music
words.definitionTh: เครื่องมือ / เครื่องดนตรี
words.example: The instrument measures pressure.

words.definitionEn: an arrangement that provides payment for loss or damage
words.definitionTh: ประกันภัย
words.example: The vehicle has full insurance.

words.definitionEn: the ability to learn and understand
words.definitionTh: สติปัญญา
words.example: Artificial intelligence supports inspection.

words.definitionEn: able to learn and understand well
words.definitionTh: ฉลาด
words.example: The system uses intelligent software.

words.definitionEn: to plan or mean to do something
words.definitionTh: ตั้งใจ
words.example: We intend to complete the project this year.

words.definitionEn: planned or designed for a particular purpose
words.definitionTh: ที่ตั้งใจไว้
words.example: The device works as intended.

words.definitionEn: very strong or extreme
words.definitionTh: รุนแรง / เข้มข้น
words.example: The material was exposed to intense heat.

words.definitionEn: something you plan or mean to do
words.definitionTh: ความตั้งใจ
words.example: Our intention is to improve safety.

words.definitionEn: a feeling of wanting to know more; to attract attention
words.definitionTh: ความสนใจ / ทำให้สนใจ
words.example: The project attracted management interest.

words.definitionEn: wanting to know or learn more
words.definitionTh: สนใจ
words.example: She is interested in automation.

words.definitionEn: making you want to know more
words.definitionTh: น่าสนใจ
words.example: The report contains interesting findings.

words.definitionEn: inside an organization, object, or body
words.definitionTh: ภายใน
words.example: The issue was found during an internal audit.

words.definitionEn: involving more than one country
words.definitionTh: ระหว่างประเทศ
words.example: The company follows international standards.

words.definitionEn: the global system connecting computers and information
words.definitionTh: อินเทอร์เน็ต
words.example: The device connects to the internet.

words.definitionEn: to explain the meaning of something or understand it in a particular way
words.definitionTh: ตีความ / แปลความ
words.example: We interpreted the test results carefully.
